items.title: Feminist Anthropology
items.body: Exploring gendered inequalities, agency, and resistance across everyday life, institutions, and systems of power.

items.title: Hijra & Transgender Studies
items.body: Ethnographic explorations of gender diversity, embodied agency, social recognition, and the politics of citizenship and belonging.

items.title: Body, Sexuality and Identity Politics
items.body: Ethnographic explorations of bodies, sexuality, and identity, with attention to agency, power, intimacy, and social norms.

items.title: Medical Anthropology
items.body: Exploring how health, healing, and well-being are shaped by culture, power, inequality, and the politics of care.

items.title: Climate Justice & Gendered Vulnerability
items.body: Exploring the intersections of climate change, gendered vulnerability, and social justice through feminist and ethnographic perspectives on adaptation, resilience, and lived experience.

items.title: Post-Truth Media
items.body: Examining the production, circulation, and contestation of truth, knowledge, and public narratives in contemporary media landscapes.

items.title: Urban Anthropology
items.body: Exploring city life, class, aspiration, and the making of middle-class selves in rapidly transforming urban landscapes.

items.title: Sexual & Reproductive Health
items.body: Examining sexual and reproductive health through the lenses of medical anthropology, health sociology, and gender justice.
